message:
test(safety): add posture endpoint validation and update-checker tests

Adds comprehensive test coverage for the safety posture API endpoint
and update checker service to ensure robust validation of responses.

Safety Posture Tests (safety.routes.test.ts):
- Verify issues/recommendations are parallel arrays for missing tools
- Ensure manifest metadata (source, schemaVersion, hash) is included
- Validate requiredSafetyTools list presence in summary
- Check recommendations include actionable install commands

Update Checker Tests (update-checker.service.test.ts):
- Add test coverage for version comparison logic
- Verify update detection for newer/older/same versions
- Test error handling for network failures

These tests ensure the safety posture endpoint provides complete,
actionable information for agents to assess and remediate safety gaps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scope:
- Local file path (default) with optional override via env.
- Zod validation with helpful error messages.
- Caching with TTL to avoid repeated disk reads.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit: bd-6huy (cache/TTL/error mapping), bd-1kkl (fallback/refresh/provenance coverage).
